name: Crescent Cristo Sandwich Loaf
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Thinly sliced smoked-cooked turkey breast
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------TOPPING----------------------------------
2 tbsp Honey
1 tbsp Sesame seeds
Heat oven to 375 degrees. Separate dough into 4 long rectangles. Place rectangles crosswise on 1 large or 2 small greased cookie sheets (rectangles should not touch); firmly press perforations to seal. In small bowl, combine butter and 2 tbsp honey; mix well. Brush over dough. Bake for 8 to 12 minutes or until light golden brown; cool 15 minutes. Grease 15 x 10 x 1-inch baking pan. Carefully place 1 crust on pan. Top evenly with turkey. Place second crust over turkey; top with cheese and ham. Place third crust over ham; spread evenly with preserves. Top with fourth crust; brush top with 2 tbsp honey. Sprinkle honey with sesame seeds. Bake for 10 to 15 minutes or until crust is deep golden brown and loaf is hot. Let stand 5 minutes. Cut into 8 slices.
